headline: VoiceToWebsite exists to turn intent into execution and revenue momentum
subheadline: The brand stays VoiceToWebsite, but the product is being positioned as an AI system manager for structured work, hybrid offers, and operator-grade visibility.

sections.title: What makes it different
sections.description: VoiceToWebsite is not being sold as another generic AI wrapper. It is being built as the operating layer that turns briefs into structured pages, offers, lead flow, and shipped execution.

sections.title: How it should grow
sections.description: The business should grow through a hybrid close: checkout-first software for recurring revenue, implementation briefs for high-intent services, and enterprise qualification for higher-trust buyers.

sections.title: What success looks like
sections.description: A successful VoiceToWebsite becomes the public funnel and operating system teams rely on when they need briefs to become useful, tracked, and repeatable execution.

cta.heading: The public funnel is now organized around that hybrid business model.
cta.body: Explore the solutions, products, pricing, and contact flow to see how VoiceToWebsite routes different buyers toward the right close path.
